ab: tavara’ʉ kara ku sumasuruvai kasua vaantuku?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: makenanu! upeni tia suruvaia musu?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: niroimi ku mavici vaantuku, tavara’ʉ kara ku sumasuruvai kasua?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: koo ku kavangvang mavici vaantuku.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: niroimi ku mavici vaantuku, tavara’ʉ kara ku sumasuruvai kasua?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ka’anʉ, siniruvaia musu me’inaan koo pa kasu mai’i.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: tavara’ʉ kara ku sumasuruvai kasua tikuru?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, takacicinia mara.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: tavara’ʉ kara ku sumasuruvai sinatʉ musu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: nipasuruvai maku na Kini.
en: B: I lent it to Kini.

ab: ’apasuruvaia ’ikua tanpu musu.
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, nakai ai’io ’ikua nura.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: ’umu’ʉcʉnʉ cu, koo ku mavici tarucung, ’apasuruvoo ku tarucung, manʉng kara?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: ucani maamia tarucung maku. cii! arakukunu kita.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: siniruvai maku me’inaan na kasua sinatʉ isi, ai’iʉn kasua.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: tia pa kara cumacʉ’ʉra cucumeni sinatʉ? tuturuo ku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: tia ku nukanmana mai’i kasua vaantuku?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: makenanu! ai’io noo ’una cu kasu vaantuku.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn’t matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: tia kasu nukanmana mai’i ’ikua vaantuku?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: mai’i ku kasua nura.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: tia kasu nukanmana mai’i ’ikua sinatʉ?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ka’anʉ miʉra nimai’i ku kasua?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: ’Avia kara ’apasuruvai kasua siarisinatʉ isi?
en: A: Did ’Avia lend you this pen?

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, siniruvai maku ’inia soni.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: siniruvai musu na ’Avia kara sua siarisinatʉ isi?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from ’Avia?

ab: ka’anʉ, nguain tamna cina nipu’a isi.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ’akia cu ma’ain, mukusaa na Paicʉ sumasuruvai ma’ain.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Paicʉ.

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, mukusa ku ’inia sumasuruvai.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: ukusao na Paicʉ, mai’ia ’ikua vaantuku kisao!
en: B: Go tell Paicʉ to give me back my money.

ab: sinikiam kasua upeni vaantuku sua nguain?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
